# HTML Block Table

<table>
  <tr>
    <td><img src="docs/alpha/logo.png" alt="Icon" width="64" height="auto" /></td>
    <td><a href="https://example.com/alpha">Alpha</a></td>
    <td>短描述。</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td><img src="docs/beta/logo.png" alt="Icon" width="64" height="auto" /></td>
    <td><a href="https://example.com/beta">Beta</a></td>
    <td>这里放一段更长的中文描述，用来拉长这一行，观察 HTML block 的右侧补齐是否会只停在当前文本行的末尾。</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td><img src="docs/gamma/logo.png" alt="Icon" width="64" height="auto" /></td>
    <td><a href="https://example.com/gamma">Gamma</a></td>
    <td>中等长度描述。</td>
  </tr>
</table>
